{{Quote|My whole life was rebellion. I ''am'' rebellion. Now I will serve as a symbol, especially cut off now, in this moment. Now I will ''truly'' live, as a symbol for ''freedom!''<nowiki></nowiki>|Raggold|<ref name="SW89" />}}
'''Raggold''' was as [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as one of the leaders of the [[Solay]] resistance against [[King/Legends|King]] [[Blackart]], spending 50 years of his life fighting Blackart's tyrannical rule. He and another freedom fighter named [[Mary]] unsuccessfully led the resistance until the arrival of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], hero of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], who led the rebellion to overthrow Blackart and briefly seize control of Solay. However, Raggold betrayed the planet to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and consumed by guilt over his betrayal, committed suicide. The Empire shortly thereafter subjugated and annexed Solay, killing Mary among many others.<ref name="SW89" />
